regions.name: top_navigation
regions.notes: Top labels, icons, currency, and state remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: powerup_tabs
regions.notes: Tab plates may be generated, but labels, state, and currency values remain live.

regions.name: item_cards
regions.notes: Item names, stat labels, progress values, progress fills, and prices remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: purchase_buttons
regions.notes: Button plates may be generated, but price/label text and disabled state remain runtime-owned.
